zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Fiennes II於1301年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾文多福時，他的父親John de Fiennes21歲，母親Joanne Jordain22歲。他於大約1325年與Maud Monceux在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1351年4月5日在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可韋斯特 迪恩哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Fiennes II于1301年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾文多福时，他的父亲John de Fiennes21岁，母亲Joanne Jordain22岁。他于大约1325年与Maud Monceux在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1351年4月5日在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰易亞斯特 素可韋斯特 迪恩哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Fiennes II was born in 1301, in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, John de Fiennes, was 21 and his mother, Joanne Jordain, was 22. He married Maud Monceux about 1325, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 April 1351, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, West Dean, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Fiennes II est né en 1301, à Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Fiennes, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joanne Jordain, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Maud Monceux environ 1325, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 avril 1351, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints Churchyard, West Dean, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Fiennes II 1301 in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Fiennes 21 und seine Mutter Joanne Jordain 22. Er hat um 1325 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England Maud Monceux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. April 1351 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England und wurde in All Saints Churchyard, West Dean, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Fiennes II è nato il nel 1301 nel Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, John de Fiennes, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Joanne Jordain, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Maud Monceux circa 1325, nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 aprile 1351, nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a All Saints Churchyard, West Dean, East Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Fiennes IIが1301年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエンドバーで生まれた時，父John de Fiennesは21歳，母Joanne Jordainは22歳であった。約1325年にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスでMaud Monceuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1351年4月5日にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスウエスト ディーンアル サインツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Herstmonceux, Eas: 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 웨스트 디 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Fiennes II(이)가 1301년 영국 벅잉함실르 웬도버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Fiennes(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanne Jordain(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1325년 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 Maud Monceux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1351년 4월 5일 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 웨스트 디 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Fiennes II nasceu em 1301, em Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Fiennes, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joanne Jordain, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Monceux aproximadamente 1325, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de abril de 1351, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints Churchyard, West Dean, East Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints Churchyard, Herstmonceux, Eas: алл сеинц чурчярд, вест дин, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Fiennes II родился в 1301 г. в местности вендовир, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Fiennes было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joanne Jordain, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Monceux около 1325 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 апреля 1351 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, вест дин, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Fiennes II nació en 1301, en Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Fiennes, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joanne Jordain, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Maud Monceux aproximadamente 1325, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de abril de 1351, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en All Saints Churchyard, West Dean, East Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
